reviews.review_title: I LOVE IT . 1 thing bad though
reviews.review_description: Ok, I love the cosmetics with the litsaber thing and grapple gun and stuff like that but there is no voice chat .

I love this game, although I don’t know if the voice chat works or not. It’s still amazing, good jump scare and a bit of a challenge. Baldi is really fast. He’s pretty glitchy though.

All I need to say is -
Fix the voice chat, I think it’s broken. 
Fix baldi, he’s so glitchy.

reviews.review_title: This game is ok but also bad.
reviews.review_description: I got the game typed in my name the allow microphone button came up so I said yes for microphone...but when I started playing I couldn't hear anyone AT ALL so please fix it and no one could hear me either so pls pls pls fix this bug.
